searching: Type job title, description or required skill...
subscription_description: Get access to famous Company matching, profile CV analytics, and priority support to find the perfect jobs for your career.
free_des1: You can access job postings from 100+ companies and explore thousands of available job opportunities.
free_des2: You can search for jobs using basic filters such as job title, employment type, location, and salary range.
free_des3: You can apply for jobs directly through the platform with an optional cover letter.
free_des4: You can create and manage your personal profile, including education, work experience, and career objectives.
free_des5: You can view and track all your current and past job applications in one place.
premium_des1: You receive instant notifications whenever a new job is posted that matches your saved preferences.
premium_des2: You can create and save a personalized search profile based on your skills, desired job titles, employment types, country, and salary range.
premium_des3: You are automatically matched with relevant job opportunities without needing to search manually every time.
premium_des4: You can discover highly relevant jobs that closely align with your technical background and career goals.
premium_des5: Your profile is marked as a premium account, helping you stand out to employers.
enterprise_des1: You receive priority notifications for high-demand job postings before they are shown to other users.
enterprise_des2: You can create and manage multiple job search profiles for different roles, locations, or career paths.
enterprise_des3: You gain access to detailed insights about job market trends and how well your skills match current demand.
enterprise_des4: Your profile is prioritized in recruiter searches, increasing your chances of being noticed by companies.
enterprise_des5: You receive dedicated support and advanced customization options tailored to serious job seekers.
need_login: You need to login to proceed with the next step.
